title: Salter 1064 WHDR Digital Kitchen Scale - 5kg Capacity, Easy Read Display, Add &Weigh/Tare Function, Measure Liquids in ml/fl.oz, Glass Platform for Baking & Cooking, Batteries Included, 17 x 23 x 1cm
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Effortlessly measure your cooking and baking ingredients up to 5 kg maximum capacity, with the Electronic Kitchen Scale from Salter.
The digital display is conveniently backlit to ensure your measurements are clear and easy to read when weighing ingredients.
Boasting an Add & Weigh function, simply set the scale to zero and add your ingredients to the bowl, saving time on washing up.
The slim design allows for easy storage and the glass platform enables you to place your bowl on the glass without covering the screen.
A fantastic substitute for a measuring jug, this digital scale boasts an Aquatronic function which will effortlessly measure liquids.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Add & Weigh 2 Easy Read LCD Display 3 Glass Platform

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Auto Shut Off, Backlit Display, Calorie Consumption, High Weight Capacity, Large Display, Lightweight, Non Slip Platform, Portable, Precision Balanced, Tare Function
